caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a striped purple and white shirt and large black over-ear headphones, is speaking during a video call. She is positioned in front of a neutral-colored wall with light-colored curtains and a blue accent fabric visible to her right. A small portion of a grey surface is visible behind her. In each frame, the text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner. Throughout the sequence, she remains centered in the shot, looking directly toward the camera with her mouth open as she talks. Her facial expression and head position remain relatively consistent, with subtle shifts in her gaze and the movement of her lips as she continues speaking across the progression of the clip.
